description.value:
Requirements You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Untethered] in zero gravity.

You have learned kasathan techniques that takes advantage of your extra arms for increasing your defense in zero gravity. You curl yourself into a tight ball, using one set of arms to balance and one set of arms to protect yourself. You lose the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] condition from being untethered, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves for as long as you're untethered or until you use an action with the manipulate trait.

Special If you're a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Void Acolyte Kasatha], you don't lose the benefits of Weightless Defense by using an action with the manipulate trait.
